claims.summary: Inter-arrival cadence and jitter describe how the bridge hears the field, not producer state itself.
claims.disposition: verify heartbeat timing, stale-hearing language, reconnect counts, and field-versus-hearing separation

claims.summary: The heartbeat needs bounded clarity evidence in addition to its qualitative field-versus-hearing sentence.
claims.disposition: implement a class-derived cadence_clarity_score with an explicit observability-only basis

claims.summary: Typed precedence over a legacy fingerprint does not establish the absence of lived legacy influence.
claims.disposition: verify that integrity reports precedence only and that compatibility/provenance surfaces do not infer subjective replacement

claims.summary: High eigenvector pairwise overlap should automatically surface a possible mode-collision review.
claims.disposition: implement max-overlap evidence, a conservative 0.90 review threshold, and a diagnostic-only regression

claims.summary: Toggling typed precedence would change compatibility interpretation rather than merely observe it.
claims.disposition: retain any precedence-policy change as Tier 5 protocol/compatibility work with fixtures, dual-reader evidence, and operator approval
